description.en: Token objects are returned by the ContextVar.set() method. They can be passed to the ContextVar.reset() method to revert the value of the variable to what it was before the corresponding set. A single token cannot reset a context variable more than once. Tokens support the context manager protocol to automatically reset context variables. See ContextVar.set(). Added in version 3.14: Added support for usage as a context manager. var¶ A read-only property. Points to the ContextVar object that c...
